description: Multi-type content hierarchy for polymorphic model demos

content_items.title: The Architecture of Observation
content_items.body: Every observation is a model of reality, compressed through the lens of the observer.

content_items.title: Morning at the Wetland
content_items.observation: Red-winged blackbirds territorial along the eastern shore. Water level 2cm above seasonal average.

content_items.title: Watershed Monitoring Network
content_items.description: Distributed sensor network for real-time watershed health tracking across 12 stations.

content_items.title: On the Nature of Connections
content_items.body: Knowledge is not stored in nodes. It lives in the edges between them.

content_items.title: Tide Pool Survey #47
content_items.observation: Sea star population recovering. Three Pisaster ochraceus observed, first since 2019.
